scripts.prebuild: rm -rf assets subnet-calculate && rm -f favicon.ico icon.svg apple-touch-icon.png
scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/index.html . && cp -R dist/assets . && mkdir -p subnet-calculate && cp dist/subnet-calculate/index.html subnet-calculate/index.html && cp dist/favicon.ico . && cp dist/icon.svg . && cp dist/apple-touch-icon.png .
